subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: All believers have attained the Heavenly Gift, but each in a different degree. All have arrived at this Great Rolling Ocean, but each one has taken that which will quench his thirst.
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @living waters; water of life, @spiritual transformation, @development of capacity and readiness
